subs:
build-artifacts:
    if: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' || !github.event.pull_request.draft }}
    permissions:
      contents: read
    name: "build-artifacts"
    runs-on: tenki-standard-medium-4c-8g
  build-artifacts:
    if: ${{ github.repository == 'openclaw/openclaw' && (github.event_name != 'pull_request' || !github.event.pull_request.draft) }}
    permissions:
      contents: read
    name: "build-artifacts"
    runs-on: tenki-standard-medium-4c-8g
  check:
    if: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' || !github.event.pull_request.draft }}
    permissions:
      contents: read
    name: "check"
    runs-on: tenki-standard-medium-4c-8g
  check:
    if: ${{ github.repository == 'openclaw/openclaw' && (github.event_name != 'pull_request' || !github.event.pull_request.draft) }}
    permissions:
      contents: read
    name: "check"
    runs-on: tenki-standard-medium-4c-8g
  check-arm:
    if: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' || !github.event.pull_request.draft }}
    permissions:
      contents: read
    name: "check-arm"
    runs-on: tenki-standard-medium-4c-8g
  check-arm:
    if: ${{ github.repository == 'openclaw/openclaw' && (github.event_name != 'pull_request' || !github.event.pull_request.draft) }}
    permissions:
      contents: read
    name: "check-arm"
    runs-on: tenki-standard-medium-4c-8g
